evals.prompt: Write 5 Meta ad hooks and headlines for our recruiting software targeting HR Directors at companies with 50-500 employees. Pain point: time-to-hire is 6+ weeks. Our USP: AI screening cuts that to 2 weeks. Budget: $15K/month.
evals.expected_output: 5 distinct ad hooks/headlines with different angles (pain-led, outcome-led, social proof, curiosity, competitive) suitable for Meta feed ads.
assertions: Provides exactly 5 distinct hooks with different angles
At least one hook is pain-led (references 6+ week hiring time)
At least one hook is outcome-led (references 2-week result)
Hooks are written for Meta feed (attention-grabbing, scroll-stopping)
Includes a recommended primary CTA for each

evals.prompt: What's a good structure for a 30-second YouTube pre-roll ad script for a B2B SaaS?
evals.expected_output: 30-second script structure with timing breakdown (hook 0-5s, problem 5-15s, solution 15-25s, CTA 25-30s) and example fill-in template.
assertions: Provides a timing breakdown for 30 seconds
Covers the unskippable CTA at the end
Includes a template or fill-in-the-blank structure

evals.prompt: Optimize my Google Ads bidding strategy
evals.expected_output: Notes this is a paid ads strategy task and redirects to paid-ads skill for bidding optimization, while offering creative-level input on ad copy quality affecting Quality Score.
assertions: Redirects to paid-ads skill for bidding strategy
Notes creative quality affects Quality Score as the connection point
